message:
fix(observability): pending gauge underflow protection and misc hardening

resource_accounting.rs:
- Replace raw fetch_sub on pending obligation counters with new
  decrement_gauge_saturating_at_zero() that uses a CAS loop to clamp
  at zero instead of wrapping to u64::MAX
- Adds two tests: underflow clamping and concurrent decrement safety

raptorq/gf256.rs:
- Add assertions that rejected_tuning_candidate_ids are empty in two
  existing tests, catching silent tuning candidate rejection bugs

server/shutdown.rs:
- Add FlagWaker test helper and new test verifying shutdown signal
  wait_until correctly wakes when a custom logical clock advances
  without wall-clock progression

transport/stream.rs:
- Add #![allow(clippy::drop_non_drop)] to suppress false-positive lint

audit/ambient.rs:
- Update static finding line reference (582 → 623) to match code shift

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -93,7 +93,7 @@ pub const KNOWN_FINDINGS: &[AmbientFinding] = &[
     // ── Spawn ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     AmbientFinding {
         file: "time/sleep.rs",
-        line: 582,
+        line: 623,
         evidence_pattern: "std::thread::spawn",
         category: AmbientCategory::Spawn,
         severity: Severity::Warning,
